news.title:
Nomura maintains Buy on Firstsource with a target price of Rs 330.
Double-digit growth, margin expansion, and 13x FY28F EPS valuation cited despite EPS cuts.
news.summary:
Nomura maintains Buy on Firstsource with a target price of Rs 330.
Double-digit growth, margin expansion, and 13x FY28F EPS valuation cited despite EPS cuts.

news.title:
Firstsource Solutions launches 'Intelligence That Operates' model integrating AI design, build, and operations.
Model focuses on outcome accountability, bridging AI potential and actual business results.
news.summary:
Firstsource Solutions launches 'Intelligence That Operates' model integrating AI design, build, and operations.
Model focuses on outcome accountability, bridging AI potential and actual business results.

news.title:
Firstsource Solutions Ltd schedules analyst/investor meetings on 16th Feb 2026.
Meetings will reiterate public domain info, with no price-sensitive disclosures.
news.summary:
Firstsource Solutions Ltd schedules analyst/investor meetings on 16th Feb 2026.
Meetings will reiterate public domain info, with no price-sensitive disclosures.

news.title:
Firstsource Solutions partners with Prosper AI to enhance voice AI in healthcare RCM.
AI voice agents improve Medicaid screenings, patient access, and expand workflows like billing.
news.summary:
Firstsource Solutions partners with Prosper AI to enhance voice AI in healthcare RCM.
AI voice agents improve Medicaid screenings, patient access, and expand workflows like billing.

news.title:
Firstsource Solutions shares dropped 2.1% to ₹303.35 post Q3FY26 results.
Net profit declined 25% YoY, impacting investor sentiment on Wednesday.
news.summary:
Firstsource Solutions shares dropped 2.1% to ₹303.35 post Q3FY26 results.
Net profit declined 25% YoY, impacting investor sentiment on Wednesday.

news.title:
Firstsource Solutions projects 14.5-15.5% revenue growth for FY26.
EBIT margins are targeted at 11.5-12% for the same period.
news.summary:
Firstsource Solutions projects 14.5-15.5% revenue growth for FY26.
EBIT margins are targeted at 11.5-12% for the same period.

news.title:
Firstsource Solutions Ltd shared its Q3FY26 earnings presentation, reporting revenue of INR 24,431M, a YoY growth of 16.2%. EBIT margin improved to 11.9%.
PAT grew 26.1% YoY to INR 2,022M. Key deal wins include partnerships in US, UK, and Australia. Recognized as a leader in Generative AI and CX services.
news.summary:
Firstsource Solutions Ltd shared its Q3FY26 earnings presentation, reporting revenue of INR 24,431M, a YoY growth of 16.2%. EBIT margin improved to 11.9%.
PAT grew 26.1% YoY to INR 2,022M. Key deal wins include partnerships in US, UK, and Australia. Recognized as a leader in Generative AI and CX services.

news.title:
Firstsource Solutions reports Q3 FY25 revenue of ₹24,674.5 mn, net profit of ₹1,203.3 mn.
Company declares ₹5.50/share interim dividend and approves GBP 22 mn acquisition of Pastdue Credit Solutions.
news.summary:
Firstsource Solutions reports Q3 FY25 revenue of ₹24,674.5 mn, net profit of ₹1,203.3 mn.
Company declares ₹5.50/share interim dividend and approves GBP 22 mn acquisition of Pastdue Credit Solutions.

news.title: Firstsource Solutions declared an interim dividend of ₹5.5 per share.
news.summary: Firstsource Solutions declared an interim dividend of ₹5.5 per share.

news.title:
Firstsource Solutions reports a Q3 exceptional item of ₹1B.
Q3 PBT rises to ₹2.52B from ₹2.24B QoQ, showing growth.
news.summary:
Firstsource Solutions reports a Q3 exceptional item of ₹1B.
Q3 PBT rises to ₹2.52B from ₹2.24B QoQ, showing growth.

news.title:
Firstsource Solutions' board will meet on 3rd Feb 2026 to review audited financial results for Q3 and nine months ending Dec 2025.
The board may also consider declaring an interim dividend and fixing its record date for FY ending March 2026.
news.summary:
Firstsource Solutions' board will meet on 3rd Feb 2026 to review audited financial results for Q3 and nine months ending Dec 2025.
The board may also consider declaring an interim dividend and fixing its record date for FY ending March 2026.

news.title:
Firstsource Solutions announces acquisition of TeleMedik, a healthcare service provider, for up to $3M.
TeleMedik will become a subsidiary of Firstsource HPHS, expanding clinical care services in the US.
news.summary:
Firstsource Solutions announces acquisition of TeleMedik, a healthcare service provider, for up to $3M.
TeleMedik will become a subsidiary of Firstsource HPHS, expanding clinical care services in the US.

news.title:
Firstsource Solutions appoints senior leaders to drive growth in its North American Healthcare businesses.
The RP-Sanjiv Goenka Group company focuses on expanding Healthcare Payer and Provider services.
news.summary:
Firstsource Solutions appoints senior leaders to drive growth in its North American Healthcare businesses.
The RP-Sanjiv Goenka Group company focuses on expanding Healthcare Payer and Provider services.

news.title:
Firstsource Solutions appoints Matthew Barlow and Scott Schrader as Presidents for Healthcare Payer and Provider Services respectively.
Venkatgiri Vandali resigns as President of Healthcare and Lifesciences Operations, effective February 2026.
news.summary:
Firstsource Solutions appoints Matthew Barlow and Scott Schrader as Presidents for Healthcare Payer and Provider Services respectively.
Venkatgiri Vandali resigns as President of Healthcare and Lifesciences Operations, effective February 2026.

news.title:
Firstsource Solutions gains 1.3% post £22M acquisition of UK-based PDC, boosting its debt collection foothold.
PDC's £16.9M turnover, £3.4M profit supports Firstsource's strategy; Q2 FY26 revenue grew 20% YoY to Rs 2,312 crore.
news.summary:
Firstsource Solutions gains 1.3% post £22M acquisition of UK-based PDC, boosting its debt collection foothold.
PDC's £16.9M turnover, £3.4M profit supports Firstsource's strategy; Q2 FY26 revenue grew 20% YoY to Rs 2,312 crore.

news.title:
Firstsource Solutions completes acquisition of UK-based Pastdue Credit Solutions Ltd for GBP 22M.
Acquisition expands FSL's presence in UK debt collection market; regulatory approvals received.
news.summary:
Firstsource Solutions completes acquisition of UK-based Pastdue Credit Solutions Ltd for GBP 22M.
Acquisition expands FSL's presence in UK debt collection market; regulatory approvals received.

news.title:
CRISIL revised Firstsource Solutions' long-term outlook to Positive from Stable, reaffirming Crisil A rating.
Short-term rating remains Crisil A1, reflecting improved credit profile of the company.
news.summary:
CRISIL revised Firstsource Solutions' long-term outlook to Positive from Stable, reaffirming Crisil A rating.
Short-term rating remains Crisil A1, reflecting improved credit profile of the company.

news.title:
Firstsource Solutions rose to Rs 367.15, up 2.5% on Nov 19.
The stock outperformed its sector, showing strong fundamentals despite lower delivery volume.
news.summary:
Firstsource Solutions rose to Rs 367.15, up 2.5% on Nov 19.
The stock outperformed its sector, showing strong fundamentals despite lower delivery volume.

news.title:
Firstsource Solutions invested in AppliedAI to enhance enterprise automation.
The platform improves regulated workflows, aiming to transform outsourcing with AI.
news.summary:
Firstsource Solutions invested in AppliedAI to enhance enterprise automation.
The platform improves regulated workflows, aiming to transform outsourcing with AI.

news.title:
Firstsource Solutions' share price rose 359% over 5 years, outpacing its 12% annual EPS growth.
TSR for Firstsource Solutions over 5 years was 415%, boosted by dividend payments.
news.summary:
Firstsource Solutions' share price rose 359% over 5 years, outpacing its 12% annual EPS growth.
TSR for Firstsource Solutions over 5 years was 415%, boosted by dividend payments.
